MessageStrip.text: These rules are enforced on every Save action.

StandardListItem.title: Material is mandatory
StandardListItem.description: Each row must have a valid material selected via Value Help.

StandardListItem.title: Percentages must be numeric and positive
StandardListItem.description: Q1–Q4 values must be greater than 0 and ≤ 100.

StandardListItem.title: Sum of Q1 + Q2 + Q3 + Q4 must equal 100%
StandardListItem.description: The total column turns green (100%) or red (≠ 100%).

StandardListItem.title: Duplicate materials are not allowed
StandardListItem.description: Each material may appear only once per fiscal year.

StandardListItem.title: Data is stored centrally
StandardListItem.description: Saved percentages are available to all downstream screens.

StandardListItem.title: Email notification triggered
StandardListItem.description: All Zonal Offices are notified via email upon save.

StandardListItem.title: Read-only for Zonal users
StandardListItem.description: These values become reference-only for Zonal and Customer roles.
